title: discount is rounded per unit before multiplying
description: totalWithDiscount rounds the discounted unit price before multiplying by qty, producing 1-cent errors versus rounding the total once.
signature: AssertionError: totalWithDiscount(1095, 2, 0.1) returned 1972, expected 1971 in pricing

candidates.replace:
const total = unitCents * qty * (1 - discountRate);
  return Math.round(total);
